reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: The worst school ever don't choose this

reviews.author: Prabu M
reviews.review_body: One of the best school, We didn't realise the value of the school till we have opted other school due to personal reasons. The school staffs are kind enough to make the kids learn with fun. They haven't pressurised kid at any point. They are capable enough to make every kid to perform on Sports day. Only thing they have to upgrade is their road facilities. Management is kind enough to talk with parents and it will not in most of the schools. This school might be the one of the few schools that builds good relationships with parents

reviews.author: Shruthi Jayabal
reviews.review_body: Hi.. Recently visited this school for enquiring about admission for KG & primary. Admission Co-ordinator gave clear cut information about the school and admission process. The co-ordinator was very friendly to the children and also cleared all our doubts patiently in detail. I was completely satisfied with the details that I gathered there. Ambience of the school was also too good. Thanks Anan! :)

reviews.author: abi abinaya
reviews.review_body: The teacher's patience and kindness towards students is truly commendable.

reviews.author: preethi ra
reviews.review_body: The idea about the observatory session is cool. In the observatory session, parents can observe the children's activity in the class. We visited the Creative class,  the teacher made sure that every child was involved in the class and it was a clever move to use the shapes to create an animal drawing that helped children understand and draw easily. We are really glad about the teacher's thought process.

reviews.author: Gowri venugopal
reviews.review_body: Hi, Thanks for the opportunity.  The Observatory session was very nice. I have noticed that my kid and his friends in the table was not interact with each other. If the talkative and silent kids mingled in the class will help the silent kids to improve. It's just a suggestion. Once again thanks for the session.

reviews.author: Kousalya Ramesh
reviews.review_body:
We are glad that there is an opportunity for parents to observe how children make use of the opportunities provided by the school and how well they interact and engage with their peers and staff. During the observatory session, we participated in our child's Western dance class. We were pleased to see how our child responds to and follows the instructions given in the dance class.

One suggestion for improvement is to frequently shuffle the children's order during the class so that each child can receive equal attention from the trainer. Please disregard this suggestion if it is already being practiced.

reviews.author: a.nitheen a
reviews.review_body: Sir I am Nitheen From 8A 2024 2025 . I want to change cca activities from drums to band.
